mapper.sql: id, company_code, company_name, plan_version, demand_source_type, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, warehouse_no, warehouse_name, aggregation_period, demand_horizon_begin_time, demand_horizon_end_time, `status`, deleted, create_time, creator_id, create_user_name, update_time, updator_id, tenant_id, demand_type
mapper.insert: insert into pl_demand_plan (company_code, company_name, plan_version, demand_source_type, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, warehouse_no, warehouse_name, aggregation_period, demand_horizon_begin_time, demand_horizon_end_time, `status`, deleted, create_time, creator_id, create_user_name, update_time, updator_id, tenant_id, demand_type) values (#{companyCode}, #{companyName}, #{planVersion}, #{demandSourceType}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{logicalPlantName}, #{warehouseNo}, #{warehouseName}, #{aggregationPeriod}, #{demandHorizonBeginTime}, #{demandHorizonEndTime}, #{status}, #{isDelete}, #{createTime}, #{createUserId}, #{createUserName}, #{updateTime}, #{updateUserId}, #{tenantId}, #{demandType})

insert into pl_demand_plan
company_code,
company_name,
plan_version,
demand_source_type,
logical_plant_no,
logical_plant_name,
warehouse_no,
warehouse_name,
aggregation_period,
demand_horizon_begin_time,
demand_horizon_end_time,
`status`,
deleted,
create_time,
creator_id,
create_user_name,
update_time,
updator_id,
tenant_id,
demand_type,
#{companyCode},
#{companyName},
#{planVersion},
#{demandSourceType},
#{logicalPlantNo},
#{logicalPlantName},
#{warehouseNo},
#{warehouseName},
#{aggregationPeriod},
#{demandHorizonBeginTime},
#{demandHorizonEndTime},
#{status},
#{isDelete},
#{createTime},
#{createUserId},
#{createUserName},
#{updateTime},
#{updateUserId},
#{tenantId},
#{demandType},
mapper.update:
update pl_demand_plan
company_code = #{companyCode},
company_name = #{companyName},
plan_version = #{planVersion},
demand_source_type = #{demandSourceType},
logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo},
logical_plant_name = #{logicalPlantName},
warehouse_no = #{warehouseNo},
warehouse_name = #{warehouseName},
aggregation_period = #{aggregationPeriod},
demand_horizon_begin_time = #{demandHorizonBeginTime},
demand_horizon_end_time = #{demandHorizonEndTime},
`status` = #{status},
deleted = #{isDelete},
updator_id = #{updateUserId},
tenant_id = #{tenantId},
demand_type = #{demandType},
where id = #{id}

update pl_demand_plan set company_code = #{companyCode}, company_name = #{companyName}, plan_version = #{planVersion}, demand_source_type = #{demandSourceType}, logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo}, logical_plant_name = #{logicalPlantName}, warehouse_no = #{warehouseNo}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, aggregation_period = #{aggregationPeriod}, demand_horizon_begin_time = #{demandHorizonBeginTime}, demand_horizon_end_time = #{demandHorizonEndTime}, `status` = #{status}, deleted = #{isDelete}, updator_id = #{updateUserId}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, demand_type = #{demandType} where id = #{id}
